title: Manganese paleogeography
description: A global, georeferenced database of manganese ore deposits through deep time and its first paleogeographic reconstruction (0-1.8 Ga in the Cao et al. 2024 plate model; >1.8 Ga paleolatitudes from the Global Paleomagnetic Database, Pisarevsky et al. 2022), together with all analysis and figure-generation code. Supports the accompanying manuscript.
